description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push to master, pull requests to master, and on release. The workflow should have three build jobs for Linux, Windows, and macOS, each running prebuildify for different targets and architectures, and upload the resulting prebuilds as artifacts. A subsequent job should pack the prebuilds into an NPM package and upload it as an artifact. Finally, a test job matrix should test the package on different Node.js versions and operating systems.
